user.title: Sunpura Battery Control Setup
user.description:
Configure your Sunpura S2400 battery system.

Warning: Very low polling intervals can overload the cloud API and may cause temporary blocks. Recommended: 5-10 seconds.

init.title: Sunpura Battery Control Options
init.description:
Adjust polling settings.

Warning: Very low polling intervals can overload the cloud API and may cause temporary blocks. Recommended: 5-10 seconds.
